content: Who can help you to learn German?
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Amastan (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: tok:jan seme li ken pana e pona tawa sina lon tenpo ni﹕ sina kama sona e toki Tosi﹖
tok:sina kama sona e toki Tosi. jan seme li ken pana e pona tawa sina﹖
tok:kama sona pi toki Tosi la, jan seme li ken pona e sina﹖
